_comment: Balanced default DD criteria. Copy and edit for a specific use case, or use a preset (lender / journalist / acquirer / aml). Scoring weights are 0 (ignore) to 3 (block-level).

_notes.filings: Overdue confirmation/accounts = management discipline signal. Lenders weight higher (2-3). Journalists lower (0-1).
_notes.officers: Appointment count >=10 = possible nominee/phoenix pattern. Churn >=3 in 12mo = instability. Acquirers weight higher (2-3).
_notes.psc: Overseas corporate PSC + no named ultimate beneficial owner = opacity. AML weight 3, most others 1-2.
_notes.disqualification: Current disqualification is near-always a hard block. Historic disqualification within N years is a review flag.
_notes.insolvency: Winding-up order ever = hard block for lenders/acquirers. Journalists care about history longer, AML treats any recent insolvency as FLAG.
_notes.charges: Registered charges against the company (secured debt). Lenders care about recency; others weight 0 by default.
_notes.vat: Trading-address vs VAT-registered-address divergence is a compliance signal. AML weight 2-3; others 1.
